name: sgs-scripts
description: CDP/Laya runtime scripts for SGS inspection and the headless game inference model.

src/node/analysis/skill-rule-matrix.cjs && node --check src/node/analysis/skill-rule-worklist.cjs && node --check src/runtime/sources/config-table-core.cjs && node --check src/runtime/sources/recording-storage.js && node --check src/runtime/model/game-model-core.cjs && node --check src/runtime/model/game-model.js && node --check src/runtime/tracker/candidate-rule-core.cjs && node --check src/runtime/tracker/order-source-rule-core.cjs && node --check src/runtime/tracker/known-hand-ledger-core.cjs && node --check
